channel.title: Technology - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.description:

item.description:

item.title: Pokémon Pokopia director Takuto Edagawa confirms Minecraft-style "cloud" servers that don't require the host to be online - Eurogamer
item.description:
1. Pokémon Pokopia director Takuto Edagawa confirms Minecraft-style "cloud" servers that don't require the host to be online  Eurogamer
  2. What is Pokopia? Inside the calming Pokémon game that ditches battles for gardening  The Guardian
  3. Pokemon Pokopia is so damn cozy  Engadget
  4. Pokopia: Game Freak on how Ruby and Sapphire inspired Pokémon’s biggest ever spin-off  Video Games Chronicle
  5. Pokémon Pokopia Will Take 20-40 Hours to Beat on Average, and There's More After the Credits, Says Director  IGN

item.title: Do you want more expansions for 'Diablo II'? It only depends on you playing the new one - Softonic
item.description:
1. Do you want more expansions for 'Diablo II'? It only depends on you playing the new one  Softonic

item.title: “Blame the gamers” backfires: Highguard dev’s tirade over reviews and memes draws heavy criticism - Notebookcheck
item.description:

item.title: 'Partnering with PS Studios Has Empowered Us': Sony Steps Up Investment in Kena's PS5 Sequel - Push Square

item.title: You can turn off Mewgenic's anti-save-scumming feature — here's how - Polygon
item.description:
1. You can turn off Mewgenic's anti-save-scumming feature — here's how  Polygon
  2. Mewgenics Has Its Own Resetti Who Will Destroy Your Run If You Save Scum  Kotaku
  3. Mewgenics has its very own Mr. Resetti that'll make 'a brain slushie' out of you and curse your cats if you save scum: 'No, seriously, I dish out IRL curses'  PC Gamer
  4. If you save scum in Mewgenics you’ll lose control of your cats  Adventure Gamers
  5. Animal Crossing retired Mr. Resetti but his anger lives on in indie roguelike hit Mewgenics, which will aggressively tell you off for save scumming  GamesRadar+
